title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
